source_metadata.description:
Petition of Michelle Pyke: Collection of age/gender/ethnicity data of jury panels by Ministry of Justice

Michelle Pyke

Ministry of Justice

Lison Harris, Policy Manager, Victims & Harm Reduction, Criminal Justice Unit

Office of the Chief Justice & Judicial Research Committee

Kieron McCarron, Chief Advisor Legal & Policy
